query:
SELECT p.id, p.name, 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM complementGroups cg WHERE cg.productId = p.id) as num_groups,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM complementItems ci JOIN complementGroups cg ON ci.groupId = cg.id WHERE cg.productId = p.id) as num_items
FROM products p 
WHERE p.establishmentId = 210008 
ORDER BY num_items DESC
LIMIT 5;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 35dchGD4KrPJFby.860a56c722bc --database enmWmXpAt34diouyKU4TE2 --execute SELECT p.id, p.name, 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM complementGroups cg WHERE cg.productId = p.id) as num_groups,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM complementItems ci JOIN complementGroups cg ON ci.groupId = cg.id WHERE cg.productId = p.id) as num_items
FROM products p 
WHERE p.establishmentId = 210008 
ORDER BY num_items DESC
LIMIT 5;
